metadata.description: Claude Code plugin marketplace bundled with the axiom-graph repo. Ships PEV (Plan-Execute-Validate agent workflow) and hook-spike (plugin-hook test harness). Absorbed from ddpoe/pev-agent-nexus per ADR-005 Phase 5.

plugins.name: pev
plugins.description: PEV (Plan-Execute-Validate) agent workflow with axiom-graph integration — /pev-cycle (full) and /pev-instance (slim)

plugins.name: hook-spike
plugins.description: Graduated plugin-hook test agents — isolates hook resolution behavior (CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT vs CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR, frontmatter vs hooks.json) with canary-file reporting and hook-input-JSON dumping
